ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score accumulated by the participant */,
  "percentile_rank" REAL /* Percentile rank of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., active, inactive, disqualified) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the participant (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round (1-12) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score for the round (can include additional details) */,
  "score_details" TEXT /* Detailed breakdown of the score */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken to complete the round */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made in the round */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_scores_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_scores_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round (1-12) */,
  "round_type" INTEGER /* Type of the round (e.g., quiz, challenge, test) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the round is conducted */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the round */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the round */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_round_type FOREIGN KEY ("round_type") REFERENCES round_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer */,
  "total_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds in the event */,
  "registration_fee" REAL /* Registration fee for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., participant, admin, judge) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource (e.g., participant, round, event) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the round type (e.g., Quiz, Challenge) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round type */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the round type for scoring calculations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
